title: Talent Show Drama
preview: Tomorrow is the Talent Show, heard that CM, DB, AW, TC, and some other people are going to make fun of BM for singing Monster by Skillet. That's uncool, yo, she's autistic.

title: R amd E DRAMAAA
content: RV Was supposedly falsely accused by EJ, due to RV attempting to date the same girl EJ was going after at the time. and then EJ proceeded to lie to everyone, including the staff and police, about what happened, sought to make RV's life hell, and just generally slander his name and reputation.
